name: Original Chex Party Mix Microwave Recipe
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Planters Mixed Nuts or Planters Peanuts
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mix together Lawry's Seasoned Salt and Lea & Perrins Worcestershire Sauce with melted margarine.
2. Pour the cereal mixture (CHEX cereals, mixed nuts or peanuts, and butter braids) into a large GLAD-LOCK Zipper Bag.
3. Pour the margarine seasoning over the cereal mixture inside the bag.
4. Seal the top of the bag securely.
5. Shake the bag until all pieces are evenly coated.
6. Transfer the contents of the bag to a large microwave-safe bowl.
7. Microwave on HIGH for 5-6 minutes, stirring every 2 minutes.
8. Spread the mixture on absorbent paper to cool.
9. Store in an airtight container.
Makes 9 cups.
Conventional Oven:
1. Preheat oven to 250°F (120°C).
2. Follow steps 1 and 3 above.
3. Transfer the mix to an open roasting pan.
4. Bake for 1 hour, stirring every 15 minutes.
5. Cool and store as directed above.
